welcome to git town

A pixel-art rendering of the gitlawb repo network as an isometric town. Buildings are repos, color-coded by their DID owner. Streets divide the districts. Tap a building to inspect.

districts · 14+ DIDs across 16 city blocks

network

3 federated peer ships hover above the town. Dotted beams = gossipsub propagation. Glowing dots traveling between buildings = RefUpdateEvent packets in flight. Pulsing windows = repos with active main-branch pushes.

Each colored neighborhood is a single DID owner. Hand-detailed buildings are the flagship repos; smaller surrounding ones are user-generated playground sessions and CI-generated fixtures — every tile is a real published repo.

⚓ Ships sailing in the ocean are live playground apps from playground.gitlawb.com/apps. Click any ship to open the app in a new tab.
